navigation.archive_path: moritzlaw.osu.edu OSBLJ landing -> 'Knowledge Bank' link -> kb.osu.edu/handle/1811/78231 == community uuid 23337044-... -> per-issue subcollections -> item -> bitstream PDF. Seed uses /collections/<uuid> URL form so DSpaceAdapter._extract_dspace_scope_id() picks up the scope (it only parses /collections/ paths). Note: 23337044-... is technically a *community* uuid, not a collection, but the DSpace REST /discover/search/objects?scope= param accepts either and correctly returns all 355 items in the community subtree.
navigation.notes: DSpace 7 Angular SPA — frontend is JS-rendered but DSpace REST API at /server/api works for enumeration (used by existing kb-osu-edu/OSJCL seed which smoke-passed). OSBLJ also publishes some recent articles directly on moritzlaw.osu.edu/sites/default/files/ (Drupal); the canonical archive is the KB community. Former title 'Ohio State Entrepreneurial Business Law Journal' (vols 1-9, 2006-2015) was renamed OSBLJ at vol 10 (2015); KB community covers both. Replaces the registry stub registry_ohio_state_business_law_journal_1321_0d8a22bf30.json which pointed at the dead /osblj path (returns 403/Drupal access-denied).
